title: Welcome to VaultBot
content: VaultBot is an AI-powered assistant for Veeva Vault. It helps users navigate Vault configurations, search help documentation, and onboard to their specific Vault implementation.

title: Getting Started with Veeva Vault
content: Veeva Vault is a cloud-based content management platform. Key areas include Document Management, Lifecycle Management, Workflows, and User/Role Administration.

title: Key Vault Concepts
content: Document Types define the structure and metadata of documents. Lifecycles control the states a document can be in. Workflows automate review and approval processes. Roles and permissions govern user access.
